q_tome_whisper.title: The Whisper Beneath the Marsh
q_tome_whisper.description: Sage Ondrel of Mirefen says a drowned light stirs in the southern marsh — the failing wards of Vael'Zhur's sunken tower-library. Find the Drowned Vault, that you may learn what wakes there.

objectives.description: Find the Drowned Vault in the marsh

q_tome_keys.title: The Scattered Keys
q_tome_keys.description: The Vault's drowning-wards can only be safely stilled with the Warding Key — broken into three fragments, scattered to the Thornwatch Ruins, the Reedmarsh warren, and the marsh-witch Ysolde. Gather all three and bring them to Ondrel.

objectives.description: Recover Warding-Key Fragment I (Thornwatch Ruins)
Recover Warding-Key Fragment II (the Reedmarsh)
Recover Warding-Key Fragment III (Ysolde's Hollow)

q_tome_reckoning.title: The Drowned Sanctum
q_tome_reckoning.description: Descend the Drowned Vault to its flooded sanctum, face Vael'Zhur the lich, and decide the fate of the Sunken Tome — seal it, destroy it, or claim its power. Warden Halric would see it sealed.

objectives.description: Defeat Vael'Zhur the Drowned

reward_choices.label: Seal the Tome (bind Vael'Zhur)
reward_choices.legend: With the Warding Key made whole, you bound Vael'Zhur back into his drowning-sleep and sealed the Vault forever — the marsh-light troubles Mirefen no more.

reward_choices.label: Destroy the Tome
reward_choices.legend: You shattered the Sunken Tome upon the cold altar; the lich crumbled to silt and old water. Vael'Zhur is ended, and his art lost with him.

reward_choices.label: Claim the Tome's power
reward_choices.legend: You took the Sunken Tome for your own. Its cold whisper follows you now — Vael'Zhur's soul-draining art is yours, and perhaps one day his fate.

troll_hunt.title: The Troll on the East Road
troll_hunt.description: A troll named Gorkash terrorizes travelers. Slay him.

objectives.description: Defeat Gorkash the troll brigand

herb_gathering.title: Herbs for the Apothecary
herb_gathering.description: Gather healing herbs from the forest for Brother Anselm.

objectives.description: Collect 3 bundles of healing herbs

tavern_intro.title: A Friendly Welcome
tavern_intro.description: Goren the tavern keeper wants to greet a newcomer.

objectives.description: Speak with Goren in the tavern

cave_exploration.title: The Dark Cave
cave_exploration.description: Investigate the mysterious cave in the mountains.

objectives.description: Enter the Dark Cave

deliver_sword.title: A Forged Blade
deliver_sword.description: Bring a sword from the smith to the guard.

objectives.description: Deliver a sword to Karim the guard

survive_night.title: Through the Night
survive_night.description: Survive until dawn while monsters roam.

objectives.description: Survive 50 turns

the_silver_edge.title: The Silver Edge
the_silver_edge.description: Durgan will teach you his finest pattern: bring a plain sword, a troll's tooth, and stolen jewelry to his forge, and craft the silver blade yourself.

objectives.description: Forge (or otherwise obtain) a Silver Blade

roads_and_rivers.title: Roads and Rivers
roads_and_rivers.description: Karim wants word carried to the outlying settlements. Walk the roads to Riverside Hamlet and Stonepine Camp and learn the lay of the land.

objectives.description: Visit Riverside Hamlet
Visit Stonepine Camp

supply_run.title: Supply Run
supply_run.description: Bram needs an iron bar carried to Hilde at the Stonepine smithy — the picks won't mend themselves.

objectives.description: Deliver an iron bar to Hilde

the_healers_art.title: The Healer's Art
the_healers_art.description: Brother Anselm offers to teach the healing prayer to one who has proven they understand herbs — brew a healing potion with your own hands first.

objectives.description: Brew (or obtain) a Healing Potion

caer_aldwyn.title: The Cellars of Caer Aldwyn
caer_aldwyn.description: Melody's grandmother's songs say the ruined keep's treasury was never opened. Bandits nest in the ruins now — clear them out and walk the old halls, and she'll finish the last verse at last.

objectives.description: Set foot in the Ruined Keep
Drive off 2 of the bandits squatting there

the_fence.title: The Fence
the_fence.description: Karim suspects someone respectable is fencing the bandits' loot. Take stolen jewelry off a bandit and bring it to him unfenced — the engraving will name the caravan it was robbed from.

objectives.description: Bring stolen jewelry to Karim as evidence

ballad_of_you.title: The Ballad of You
ballad_of_you.description: Melody insists your legend needs verses — and verses need witnesses. Introduce yourself to every barkeep in the region so they can corroborate her wilder claims. ('Artistic license requires signatures,' she says.)

objectives.description: Get Goren's account at the Oakvale Tavern
Get Esra's account at the Riverside Inn
Get Wulf's account at the Camp Tavern

melodys_lost_ballad.title: The Lost Ballad
melodys_lost_ballad.description: Melody's masterpiece needs a finale — and inspiration is thirsty work. Bring her two bottles of wine and she'll finish it on the road with you.

objectives.description: Gather 2 bottles of wine for Melody

castle_audience.title: An Audience with the King
castle_audience.description: Captain Ser Brannock will present you to King Aldric III in the Great Hall. Mind your manners.

objectives.description: Be presented to King Aldric III

castle_whispers.title: Whispers in the Hall
castle_whispers.description: Queen Maera fears Duke Voss moves against her son. Sound out those who see and hear everything at court — the maid and the bard.

objectives.description: Ask Maid Rowena what she has seen
Ask Lyle the Lute what he has heard

castle_the_spy.title: The Spy in the Household
castle_the_spy.description: The trail leads to the Duke's own apartments. Find the proof of his plot and carry it to the Queen.

objectives.description: Recover Duke Voss's cipher from the Royal Apartments
Deliver the cipher to Queen Maera

castle_gambit.title: The Duke's Gambit
castle_gambit.description: With the cipher in hand, Prince Cedric asks you to stand with him and lay the Duke's treason before the King.

objectives.description: Expose Duke Voss's plot to the King
Face Duke Voss with his treason

castle_crypt.title: What Stirs Below
castle_crypt.description: Mother Aldith cannot keep the dead of Bloodstone at rest. Descend to the Royal Crypt and put the restless bones back to sleep.

objectives.description: Lay the restless dead of the crypt to rest

castle_voss_gambit.title: The Duke's Offer
castle_voss_gambit.description: Duke Voss knows you hold his cipher. He offers you gold and a place at his side — betray Prince Cedric, and the throne may yet change hands.

objectives.description: Take Duke Voss's offer
Betray Prince Cedric to the Duke

main_1_the_stirring.title: The Stirring Wilds
main_1_the_stirring.description: Alzara the wizard has read dark omens: the wilds stir with an unnatural menace. Cull the beasts and prove the threat is real.

objectives.description: Slay 3 stirring beasts

main_2_the_source.title: The Source in the Deep
main_2_the_source.description: Something calls the beasts out of the dark. Seek its source in the deep places of the world.

objectives.description: Descend into the Dark Cave

main_3_the_lore.title: The Old Lore
main_3_the_lore.description: Brother Anselm keeps the old lore of the wyrms. Learn what you face before it is too late.

objectives.description: Hear Brother Anselm's lore of the wyrms

main_4_the_gathering_night.title: The Gathering Night
main_4_the_gathering_night.description: The darkness gathers to a head. Steel yourself and survive the coming night; at dawn, the reckoning waits.

objectives.description: Survive the gathering night

main_5_the_reckoning.title: The Reckoning
main_5_the_reckoning.description: The shadow over the realm has a name and a shape: the Elder Wyrm. Face it in its lair and end the darkness — or fall, and let it consume all.

objectives.description: Slay the Elder Dragon and end the shadow

timed_bounty.title: Before the Trail Goes Cold
timed_bounty.description: A marauder was sighted at the edge of the wilds. Run it down before it slips away — you have only until dusk.

objectives.description: Slay the marauder before time runs out

q_clear_bandit_camp.title: Break the Bandit Camp
q_clear_bandit_camp.description: Outlaws raid the roads from a camp hidden in the forest. Find it and cut down their chief — scatter the band and the wilds will run far safer.

objectives.description: Defeat the Bandit Chief at the camp

bounty_wolves.title: Wolf Bounty
bounty_wolves.description: The wolves grow bold on the outskirts. The watch pays a standing bounty for every pack thinned — come back whenever they gather again.

objectives.description: Cull 4 wolves from the outskirts

standing_herbs.title: Standing Order: Healing Herbs
standing_herbs.description: Brother Anselm always needs more herbs for his remedies. Bring a fresh bundle whenever you can and he'll pay each time.

objectives.description: Gather 3 bundles of healing herbs

cull_goblins.title: The Goblin Menace
cull_goblins.description: Goblins keep creeping down from the hills to pilfer and pillage. There's coin for anyone who keeps their numbers down — a standing arrangement.

objectives.description: Slay 5 marauding goblins

the_bandit_bargain.title: The Brigand's Bargain
the_bandit_bargain.description: Gorkash the brigand offers you a cut of his takings to look the other way. Accept, and the guard's warrant against him goes unserved.

objectives.description: Strike a deal with Gorkash

bring_brigand_to_justice.title: Bring the Brigand to Justice
bring_brigand_to_justice.description: The guard wants Gorkash the brigand answered for. Cut him down on the East Road — or take his bargain instead, and let him walk.

objectives.description: Bring Gorkash to justice

reward_choices.label: Claim his blade and a commendation
